text: IRAN DOMESTIC: Internet shutdown enters 70th day per NetBlocks. Pezeshkian met Mojtaba Khamenei for 2.5 hours — seeks to quash 'divided leadership' narrative. But Pezeshkian earlier called IRGC UAE strikes 'completely irresponsible' and 'madness.' Civil-military divide in Iran is real despite show of unity.
verificationNote: CNN cited NetBlocks. Al Jazeera confirmed Pezeshkian-Khamenei meeting. Iran International reported IRGC criticism.

text: LEBANON FRONT COLLAPSE: IDF killed Hezbollah Radwan commander Ballout in Beirut (first strike since April 16 ceasefire). Hezbollah retaliated with record 105 attack waves — 1 killed, 14 wounded in Nahariya. Rockets at Karmiel, W. Galilee, Haifa Bay. IDF struck ~20 targets overnight. Ceasefire effectively dead. Peace talks round 3 still planned May 14-15.
verificationNote: Times of Israel and Media Line confirmed Nahariya casualties. JPost confirmed Ballout killing.

text: CHINA PLAY: Araghchi in Beijing — Wang Yi proposes 'four shared homelands' peace concept. Araghchi endorses it. Key timing: 1 week before Trump-Xi summit May 14-15. China positioning as alternative mediator. First Chinese tanker (JV Innovation) attacked May 4 — Beijing publicly angered. China-Iran trade already down 50% YoY.
verificationNote: Al Jazeera confirmed Beijing meeting. Caixin Global confirmed Chinese tanker attack.

text: UAE UNDER FIRE AGAIN: UAE intercepted fresh Iranian missiles/drones May 8. Dubai schools on distance learning Day 4. Bahrain requested UNSC closed consultation May 6 after first Iranian strikes on UAE since April 8 ceasefire. 3 Indian nationals wounded at Fujairah Oil Zone May 4. Arrow-3 crisis: Knesset emergency meeting — Iran making missiles faster than Israel producing interceptors.
verificationNote: Al Jazeera liveblog confirmed UAE intercepts. Security Council Report confirmed Bahrain UNSC request. Haaretz confirmed Arrow-3 gap.

text: SANCTIONS SQUEEZE: May 1 sanctions hit 6 individuals, 21 entities including Chinese petroleum terminal (Qingdao Haiye). 12th round since Feb 2025. Iranian rial collapsed to 1.789M/USD (free market) — down 55% in 12 months. China-Iran trade down 50% YoY Q1 2026. But CIA says Iran can outlast blockade 3-4 months using overland smuggling.
verificationNote: US Treasury confirmed sanctions. WaPo confirmed CIA assessment. Bonbast confirmed rial rate.

text: OIL UPDATE: Brent $100.54 (+26.0% pre-war), WTI $94.35 (+25.0%). Off yesterday's highs. S&P 500 record 7,365 on deal hopes. Gas $4.55 (AAA). OPEC+ 188K bpd increase for June (without UAE, quit May 1). IEA: 412M barrels from strategic reserves. Hormuz Day 67 blockade — partially blocked, ~5% of pre-war traffic.
verificationNote: Trading Economics confirmed oil prices. AAA confirmed gas. CNBC confirmed S&P record.

text: DAY 70 AM ASSESSMENT: 3 IDF soldiers wounded by Hezbollah FPV explosive drones in S. Lebanon (1 seriously). IDF retaliated with strikes across Nabatieh, Ain Baal, Dibbin. Lebanon-Israel talks still on for May 14-15 in Washington despite ceasefire collapse. Key question: can compartmentalized diplomacy survive escalating military reality?
verificationNote: Times of Israel confirmed IDF casualties. Arab News confirmed Washington talks.

text: MARITIME: Lloyd's confirms Hormuz 'closed' — ~5% of pre-war traffic. 22,500 mariners trapped on 1,550+ vessels. 147 containerships (470K TEU) stuck. French CMA CGM San Antonio attacked May 5 with crew injuries. Ship operators say they'll 'remain cautious until stable, predictable' situation. South Korea routing 4th tanker via Red Sea alternative.
verificationNote: NBC News and Jerusalem Post confirmed shipping data. UPI confirmed South Korean tanker.

text: WAR COSTS REALITY CHECK: Pentagon says $25B — Harvard Kennedy School says 'certain we will reach $1 trillion.' WaPo: 228 structures at US bases damaged (not officially acknowledged). Trump requesting $1.5T defense budget (42% increase, largest since WWII). Iran losing $500M/day from blockade. Israel $11.5B. Iran self-assessed $300B-$1T damage.
verificationNote: Al Jazeera, CNN, CNBC confirmed cost figures. WaPo confirmed base damage investigation.

text: POPE-RUBIO SUMMIT: Rubio met Pope Leo XIV at Vatican for 2.5 hours — 'frank conversation' on Iran war disagreements. Vatican press: 'efforts to achieve a durable peace in the Middle East.' Trump had accused Pope of 'endangering' Catholics. Earlier Pope surprised 13 Lebanese priests via video: 'Peace is near.' Vatican-US tensions over war continuing to escalate.
verificationNote: CNN, NPR, Washington Times, Bloomberg confirmed Vatican meeting and video call details.

text: FOOD IMPACT: USDA forecasts food-at-home +2.5% for 2026. Farm wheat up 8.4%. Palm/soybean oil each +8%. Tehran wheat flour up 120% in one month, nearly 200% YoY. Fertilizer +30-40% in 4 weeks (nitrogen +35%). Average US grocery bill up $14/week ($182 vs $168 pre-war). If Hormuz persists through summer, food-at-home could add 5-7 more percentage points.
verificationNote: USDA ERS confirmed food price forecasts. FAO confirmed commodity data. Discovery Alert confirmed fertilizer.

text: TANKER WAR: US Navy disabled 2 Iranian tankers (Sea Star III, Sevda) in Gulf of Oman May 8 — direct retaliation for Iran seizing Barbados-flagged Ocean Koi (under US sanctions since Feb). Most aggressive blockade enforcement since war began. Naval engagements now at 9-day high tempo. 31 Iranian tankers with 53M barrels still stranded.
verificationNote: NPR, gCaptain, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg confirmed all tanker incidents.

text: DIPLOMATIC TRACK: Rubio in Rome publicly says US 'expecting Iran response Friday' on 14-point peace MOU. But Iran FM spokesman Baghaei (via Tasnim): proposal 'under review,' no timeline. Direct contradiction. Three sources say enrichment moratorium will likely land at 12 years (Iran wanted 5, US 20). Pakistan still mediating. Witkoff/Kushner negotiating.
verificationNote: CNBC confirmed Rubio statement. Al Jazeera/Tasnim confirmed Baghaei. Time/Axios confirmed MOU details.

text: TRUMP RHETORIC: Trump at Lincoln Memorial site calls Iran 'led by LUNATICS,' warns of 'pain' if no deal soon, predicts war 'will be over quickly.' Reiterates Hormuz strikes 'just a love tap.' Threats now in 8th day cycle: love tap → glow → pain → quickly. Tracking which threshold actually triggers Iran response.
verificationNote: Times of Israel and CNBC confirmed Trump quotes.

text: HEZBOLLAH PUBLIC CLAIMS: Hezbollah today publicly claimed approximately a dozen attacks on Israeli military posts in Lebanon — first publicly claimed cross-border attacks since April 8 truce. Followed Beirut strike on Radwan commander Ballout (May 6). Drone attack wounded 2 IDF soldiers near Lebanon border May 8. 105 attack waves — record day since war began.
verificationNote: Times of Israel confirmed IDF wounded. Al Jazeera liveblog confirmed Hezbollah public claims.
